title: java-1.8.0-openjdk bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
* Wed Sep 24 2025 Kevin Lyons <kevin.x.lyons@oracle.com4 - 1:1.8.0.462.b08-4.0.1
- Add Oracle vendor bug URL [Orabug: 34340155]

[1:1.8.0.462.b08-4]
- Bump rpmrelease for CentOS build
- Remove obsolete hack to hardcode newer portable version on RHEL
- Related: RHEL-101648
- Related: RHEL-102312
- Related: RHEL-97496
